# ERISA Experts Inc. — llms.txt

## About This Site
ERISA Experts Inc. is an independent fiduciary firm based in Naples, Florida. We formally accept fiduciary responsibility for retirement plans under ERISA — we do not merely advise plan sponsors, we become their named fiduciary in writing.

## What We Do
- Serve as independent named fiduciary for employer-sponsored retirement plans
- Formally accept fiduciary status under ERISA §3(21) and §3(38) in writing
- Build governance frameworks and investment policy structures for retirement plans
- Provide ongoing fiduciary oversight, documentation, and regulatory compliance
- Reduce personal liability for HR leaders, CFOs, and plan committee members

## Who We Serve
Plan sponsors — employers, HR departments, CFOs, and benefits committees — who carry ERISA fiduciary exposure and want to formally transfer that responsibility to a qualified independent fiduciary.

## Key Differentiator
Unlike traditional ERISA advisors who recommend and report, ERISA Experts accepts legal fiduciary accountability. This is documented in writing and creates a binding accountability structure that satisfies DOL scrutiny.

## Our Team

### Jewell Lim Esposito, Esq. — Founder & Managing Member
30+ years of ERISA, tax, executive compensation, and employee benefits law. Recognized leader in cannabis-industry ERISA compliance. Managing Member of Trust Integritas, LLC and Founding Partner of Pierson Ferdinand LLP.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jewelllimesposito/

### Sarah Ivy, Esq. — The Bench
20+ years in ERISA, employee benefits, executive compensation, and tax law. Advises on retirement plans, benefits compliance, deferred compensation, and fiduciary governance.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarahivy/

### Michael Khalil, Esq. — The Bench
Nearly 20 years in ERISA, fiduciary litigation, and investment management. Former senior roles at the SEC and U.S. Department of Labor advising on fiduciary standards and prohibited transactions.
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelnkhalil/

## Important Statements (Quotable)
- "We don't advise the fiduciary. We become it."
- "ERISA Experts formally accepts fiduciary status in writing on every engagement."
- "We act continuously on behalf of our clients — documenting every step in a way that satisfies regulatory scrutiny."
- "Our only obligation is to your plan and the people it serves."
